creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: eadler (ports committer)
Date: Sun Jan 15 17:01:28 2012
New Revision: 230141
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/230141

Log:
  Remove duplicate line from usage
  
  PR:		bin/164139
  Submitted by:	Yuri Pankov <yuri.pankov@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	nwhitehorn
  MFC after:	3 days

Modified:
  head/usr.bin/grep/grep.c

Modified: head/usr.bin/grep/grep.c
==============================================================================
--- head/usr.bin/grep/grep.c	Sun Jan 15 16:58:44 2012	(r230140)
+++ head/usr.bin/grep/grep.c	Sun Jan 15 17:01:28 2012	(r230141)
@@ -158,7 +158,6 @@ usage(void)
 {
 	fprintf(stderr, getstr(4), getprogname());
 	fprintf(stderr, "%s", getstr(5));
-	fprintf(stderr, "%s", getstr(5));
 	fprintf(stderr, "%s", getstr(6));
 	fprintf(stderr, "%s", getstr(7));
 	exit(2);
